official_routes.competition: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Pre-deployment trials
official_routes.route_requirement: UK registered organisations; collaborations only; UK registered business lead must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

official_routes.competition: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Feasibility studies
official_routes.route_requirement: UK registered organisations; collaborations only; UK registered business lead must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

official_routes.competition: Clean Maritime Demonstration Competition 7: Deployment trials
official_routes.route_requirement: UK registered organisations; collaborations only; UK registered business lead must collaborate with other UK registered organisations.

findings.finding: The current action register and board classify all three CMDC7 strands as nearest-deadline maritime routes requiring partner, asset/site, permissions, safety and budget evidence before portal action.

The P1 register identifies Artemis Technologies, Belfast Harbour, Navantia UK / Harland & Wolff, and CATAGEN as public target candidates. The register states these are lead-acquisition candidates, not commitments.

Current CMDC7 outreach payloads exist for Artemis, Belfast Harbour, Navantia / Harland & Wolff, and CATAGEN. They request route evidence and are draft-only; no reply or signed partner evidence was found.
No direct Google Drive result was found for CMDC7.

findings.source: Google Drive search: Clean Maritime / maritime Aureon
findings.finding: Drive search returned broad historical or operating-log material, plus the Aureon Grant War Room. It did not return a committed CMDC7 maritime partner, vessel or port trial site, safety/permissions owner, deployment schedule, or eligible-cost schedule.
The Drive war-room sheet predates the current IFS CMDC7 routing and does not record a CMDC7 submission lead or route-unlocking maritime evidence.

Local search found existing grant artifacts and draft outreach references. No committed UK maritime lead, vessel or site context, permission/safety case, insurance basis, partner budget, or deployment plan was found.

APP-IFS-CMDC7-PREDEPLOYMENT-2415-2026070: safety case, permits and insurance basis

decision.why_not_now: The current local, Drive and Aureon evidence set contains public targets and draft outreach, but not a committed maritime consortium lead, asset/site, permissions/safety owner, budget, or deployment/work-package evidence.
decision.next_operator_action: Use the current CMDC7 outreach payloads to obtain a committed maritime lead or referral, asset/site context, permissions and budget evidence. Re-run this delta immediately after any reply or partner document lands in Gmail, Drive or local folders.

controls: Local and Drive evidence references were classified for grant-side use only.
No IFS portal field was changed.
No external email, contact form, partner invite or upload action was performed.
No password, runtime secret, bank detail or private finance payload was written to this artifact.
No public target was treated as a partner commitment.
